name: Verana TRQP Profile
description: Verana profile of the ToIP Trust Registry Query Protocol v2.0. Encodes the constraints, action vocabulary, resource grammar, identifier-shape rules, context extensions, trigger semantics, scope rules, and response extensions that a Verana-conformant TRQP endpoint MUST honour. Companion to the prose in the Verana indexer specification, section 'Trust Registry Query Protocol v2'.

session_id.description: Binds the answer to a Verana participant session (VPR MOD-PP-MSG-10). When supplied alongside `time`, `time` MUST fall inside the session's validity window — otherwise the answer is denied with `message: "session out of window"`. If the session does not exist, the answer is denied with `message: "session not found"`.

triggers.authorization: An active Participant entry exists where the Participant's schema is owned by the Ecosystem whose did = authority_id, the Participant's corporationId references the Corporation whose did = entity_id, role = action_role_map[action], the schema's URI form (`vpr:verana:<network>:cs:<id>`, deterministic from the schema's stable ledger id) equals resource, and state = ACTIVE at evaluation time. The indexer translates the URI form to the schema's stable id internally; the wire format remains URI-based.
triggers.recognition: An Ecosystem entry exists where did = entity_id, its corporationId references the Corporation whose did = authority_id, and archived IS NULL at evaluation time, AND a CredentialSchema entry exists whose URI form (`vpr:verana:<network>:cs:<id>`, deterministic from the schema's stable ledger id) equals resource and is owned by that ecosystem at evaluation time. The indexer translates the URI form to the schema's stable id internally; the wire format remains URI-based.

verana.description: Verana-specific breadcrumb describing the underlying VPR record that grounded the answer. Opaque to non-Verana TRQP consumers; permitted by upstream TRQP because the upstream response schemas do not set top-level `additionalProperties: false`.

participant_state.description: State of the matching Participant row at time_evaluated. Only ACTIVE triggers `authorized: true` in spec-v4.

since.description: Block time at which the matching Participant row entered its current state. ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 datetime in UTC, terminated by `Z`.

deposit.description: Trust deposit currently bonded by the corporation backing this participation. Cosmos amount-denom pair, e.g. `10000000uvna`.

ecosystem_active_egf_version.description: Version of the Ecosystem Governance Framework (EGF) currently active for `entity_id`.

controlling_since.description: Block time at which `authority_id` (the corporation, identified by its stable bech32 group `id`) became the controlling Corporation of `entity_id` (the ecosystem). ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 datetime in UTC, terminated by `Z`.

discovery.governance_framework_discoverable_via: authority_id (per TRQP v2.0, Identifiers / authority_id, and Conformance / TRQP Endpoint Conformance)

errors.out_of_scope_recognition_message: out of spec-v4 recognition scope (corporation → ecosystem only)
